cssIntellisense.classesFileName.description: Default class map file name to search for in the workspace when no explicit path is configured.

cssIntellisense.classesFilePath.description: Paths to class map JSON files. Relative paths are resolved from the workspace root. Absolute paths are supported. Maps are merged in order.

scripts.pack: npm run compile && npm run build && vsce package
scripts.next_version: npm version 1.0.3 --no-git-tag-version && git add . && git commit -m "Release 1.0.3" && git tag v1.0.3
